channel.title: Black Forest Labs
channel.description: Black Forest Labs — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: FLUX.2 is now on device: ASUS ProArt laptops now support Klein models
item.description: For the first time a FLUX model will ship on consumer hardware. In partnership with ASUS and NVIDIA, creators picking up a new ASUS ProArt laptop will find FLUX.2 [klein] optimized for the device.
